data.title: figma_node_mapper.py output missing required spatial-layout.json schema fields (storyId, designId, layout, tag)
data.description: Completion verifier found DD4 gap: output-format-reference.md formal schema requires storyId, designId, layout (top-level) and tag (per-component). The mapper produces only metadata+components. These fields require orchestration context (story/design IDs) not available to the mapper alone. Need to either: (1) add a --story-id/--design-id CLI flag and tag generation, or (2) clarify that schema compliance is handled by the calling orchestration layer. Created from story 147a-5eec verifier.
